title: Birthday Dinner 生日聚餐
scene: 朋友们为Mike举办生日聚餐。

lines.en: Happy birthday, Mike! We are so happy you are here!
lines.zh: 生日快乐，迈克！很高兴你来！

lines.en: Thank you, Tom! This restaurant is beautiful!
lines.zh: 谢谢你，汤姆！这家餐厅真漂亮！
我们点了你最喜欢的披萨。

lines.en: You are the best friends ever!
And here is a birthday cake for you!
lines.zh: 还有这是给你的生日蛋糕！

lines.en: Wow! It has candles on it! Can I make a wish?
lines.zh: 哇！上面有蜡烛！我可以许愿吗？

lines.en: Of course! Close your eyes and make a wish.
lines.zh: 当然可以！闭上眼睛许个愿吧。

lines.en: I wish we will always be good friends.
lines.zh: 我希望我们永远是好朋友。

lines.en: This is the best birthday dinner ever!
